instruction:
Two green balls and one red ball drawn from a barrel without replacement: Compute what is the probability $p ( R G )$ of drawing one red and one green ball in either order?

Options:
A. $$
7 / 12
$$
B. $$
1 / 3
$$
C. $$
11 / 18
$$
D. $$
5 / 6
$$
E. $$
4 / 9
$$
F. $$
1 / 4
$$
G. $$
8 / 15
$$
H. $$
1 / 2
$$
I. $$
3 / 4
$$
J. $$
2 / 3
$$
